TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakaliman: == Mi-lu a nikiluan nu nisubelidan a zaysang nu kitakit. Áßėť≠ĮšłĖÁēĆťĀļÁĒĘŚźćťĆĄ duduc lyen-he-kow-cyaw-ke-win sakaput 1972 a mihcaan a nipaketu "midiput tu lalangawan nu kitakit atu kapulungan a nisubelidan a zaysang nu kitakit" kitakit a nisubelidan zaysang u tuzu' hamin nu tademaw iza ku kahenulan a lalangawan atu siacaay nisubelidan a zaysang. Mi-lu i 1982 a mihca 2 a bulad 24 a demiad micumud tu kapulungan a nikatatelek, uyni a kanatal lalanay atu lalangawa a nazipaan namahiza kapah mala "nikiluan a ngangan nu nisubelidan a zaysang nu kitakit" Mi-lu katukuh 2021 a mihcaan pulung iza ku 13 a kitizaan nu nisubelidan a zaysang nu kitakit, zuma siwa ku lalangawan a nisubelidan a zaysang, tusa ku kitizaan nu lalaya a nisubelidan a zaysang, namahiza maedem ku lalangawan atu lalayan a nisubelidan a zaysang tatungusay tu tusaay a kitizaan a nisubelidan a zaysang. makay siyan 9000~1200 a mihcaanay a Ci-al-ke a lalangawan, katuku kacakatad nu In-cya hungti a ziday malingatu mikuwan, Ku-s-ke-ku-cen izaw tu ku matenesay tu alikisi, kanahatu i 1535 a mihcaan, Si-pang-ya nu mitahaway ci Pi-sa-low atu Ow-cow nu midebungay miala tu hamin nu kakitizaan nu Ku-s-ke. Ťá™Ť•ŅŚÖÉ900„ÄúŚÖ¨ŚÖÉ1200 . uyza u Ku-s-ke atu sumamaday a likisi atu kahenulan, yadah t uku nisupedan tu nu ayaway a Ke-lun-pu zidayan a nisubelidan a nazipaan, saaca iza henay ku nu Nan-mey-cow u siacaay a nipatiza nu pidebungan a ziday nu Si-pang-ya, i 1983 a mihcaan pasakamu ku Lyan-he-kow cyaw-ke-wen a sakaput mala nu kitakit a nisubelidan a zayzang tu. Ca-wen-te-ta-al "Si-pan-ya a kamu, Chav√≠n de Hu√°ntar" nu Ca-wen a lalangawan u kahenulan nu migingkiway tu nazipaan, tini i Mi-lu saamisanay a An-ka-sen-ta-ci,laled tu Li-ma pakala tu 250 kung-li,katalakaw 3,15o depah, 1985 a mihcaan mala Lyen-he-kow-cyaw-ke- wen sakaput i ngangan nu kitakit tu nisubelidan a zaysan, nisulitan a nganganu Sya-wen migingkiway tu nazipaan. "Ca-wen" nu tizaay akamu nu Yencumin, u imi "puna". " ". Wa-s-ka-lan aidangan nu kanatal Áď¶śĖĮŚć°Ťė≠ŚúčŚģ∂ŚÖ¨Śúí Wa-s-ka-lan aidangan nu kanatal "Si-pan-ya a kamu, Parque Nacional Huascar√°n" nu Mi-lu aidangan nu kanatal, tini i An-ti-s a buyu'an satipay a Pu-lan-ka a buyu'an, satalakaway a buyu' nu Mi-lu, katalakaw 6,768 miay nu Wa-s-ka-lanay saamisan nu talakaway a buyu' tinini. 1985 a mihcaan mala Lyen-he-kow-cyaw-ke-wen sakaput kitakit nisubelidan a zaysan Cang-cang kitizaan migingkiw tu nu sumamadaya tuud Cang-cang "Chan Chan"nu itiniay Mi-lu nu saamisan a sakuwan tu La-pow-ta-te nu tabakiay a kitizaan migingkiw tu nazipaan, i nuwalian 5 kung-li nu Te-lu-si-lye. Cang-cang sa u kahenulan a tukuy nu Ci-mu hungti a kanatal, i 850 a mihcaan katukuh 1470 a mihcaan haymaw satu pitizeng, 15 se-ci palawpesen tu nu In-cya hungti a kanatal. ciniza sa ayaway nu Ke-lun-pu a zidayan Nan-mey-cow nu satabakiay a tukay, hamin nu hekal pakala tu 20 pin-bang-kung-li, hamin nu tukuy taneng 30,000 ku micumuday nu tademaw. u tukuy cacay a bataan ku nisanga' tu silanga'tay nu kakitaan a luma', uyni a kakitaan a luma' u sapisalisin, pitademad a lisin, biw, pisupedan tu nanum atu puenengan. Cang-cang i 1986 a mihcaan Li-n-he-kow-cyaw-ke-win sakaput mala u nisubelidan a zaysang nu kitakit, patahal pangangan u Cang-cang a tukay u kitizaan nu migingkiwaw tu sumamaday a tuud. . Ma-nu-aidangan nu kanatal ť¶¨Śä™ŚúčŚģ∂ŚÖ¨Śúí Ma-nu-aidangan nu kanatal "Si-pang-ya a kamu, Parque nacional del Manu" nu Mi-luay aidangan nu kanatal, tini i 1973 a mihca 5 a bulad 29 a demiad, 222 a lamangan nu micucu'ay aadipen a pihibangan. :Parque nacional del Manu) . Li-ma a likisi Śą©ť¶¨ś≠∑ŚŹ≤šł≠ŚŅÉ Li-ma a likisi u malumanay a tukuy, malumanay a tukuy i saamisay nu tukuy micapi tu Li-ma-k a sauwac, maci a zazan makay satip amis pasa wali nuwalian palahad, nuayawan nu Mi-lu u sakahenulan a piliwkuan. i capi nu Li-ma a kitizaan, iza ku nazipaan nu Pa-ha-ka "Pachacamac" misengiay tu Cow-kow-Sin-cyang-s-luay a nazipaan nu Kaw-cang a kanatal. likisi nu Li-ma paazih tu La-tin-Mey-coway, sikahenulan cen-ce, kye-zay atu lalangawan u sakahenulanay sa nu Si-pan-ya nu midebungay a tukayay palahad tu likisi. tungus kitizaan micidek ku lalangawan, masuped tu ku tawyaay a ziday a nipatizeng, nalimaan, kasazuma, nizungaan, siacaay a likisi, namahiza u zayliw makay i nidemiad, ninel atu kaydih nu saykay amisumad. caay kuyni dada', Li-ma likisian maading tu nu Mi-lu kanatal a hulic tu saka 28296 banggu lalangawan nu kanatal a nisubelidan a zaysang, ayaway likisi na u Li-ma-se a cen-bu, Li-ma-ke a cen-bu, lalangawanay a pulung situngus mikuwan. tini i Mi-luay a Sen-ma-tun-ci, patizeng i 1983 a mihcaan, calap tu lala' 27 emang tu kung-cin. Labu nu aidangan pasucaledesay a A-tu-s-san a buyubuyu'an, u talakaw caay tu knalecad, mauzipay yadah ku kasaetiman a aadupen mulangaway. labu nu aidangan malakuit ku 30 a kitizaan ayaw nu Si-pang-ya a zidayan tu nu sumamaday a nazipaan. Na-s-ka-syen "Si-pang-ya a kamu, L√≠neas de Nazca/'n√¶zk…Ďňź/" Ci-cu-wa a kamu "Naska siq'ikuna" caay a sakaput tini i satimulan nu Mi-lu a Say-ciw-la-sa-muan, i Na-s-ka-cen atu Pa-al-pa-se a laedan nu tabakiay hekal a masabacuay, u heni i ayaw nu kung-yen 500 a mihcaan katukuh kung-yen 500 a mihcaan, nu macakatay a Na-s-ka i likelikenan misanga' tu masahemungan ancaay pataay a nikelitan, amibakah tu maliwanay i baetu nu cayay kalecad a kulitan nu lala' a pabaluhay misanga'. ÁīćśĖĮŚć°Á∑ö(Ť•ŅÁŹ≠ÁČôŤ™ě:L√≠neas de Nazca/'n√¶zk…Ďňź/ ÔľõŚ•áś•öÁď¶Ť™ě:Naska siq'ikuna) . A- lye-ci-pa-cen a likisian ťėŅťõ∑ŚüļŚłēŚüéś≠∑ŚŹ≤šł≠ŚŅÉ A-lye-ci-pa "Si-pang-ya a kamu, Arequipa,Si-pang-ya a ngiha, "(a…ĺe'kipa)"Ay-ma-la-a kamu atu Ke-ciw-ya a kamu, Ariqipa" timul nu Mi-lu nu tamakiay a tukay, uyni dada' angangan nu Li-ma, namahiza nu A-lye-ci-pa sakuwan a sakaput, nu Mi-lu a kitizaan nu pahulicay a huing, hina panganganen tu " Mi-luay nipaketunan nu hulic tu angangan nu tukuy". ťėŅťõ∑ŚüļŚłē(Ť•ŅÁŹ≠ÁČôŤ™ě:Arequipa,Ť•ŅÁŹ≠ÁČôŤ™ěÁôľťü≥:(a…ĺe'kipa),ŤČĺť¶¨śčČŤ™ěŚíĆŚÖčšłėšļěŤ™ě:Ariqipa) ". Ka-la-al-Su-pey-sen-cen Ść°śčČÁąĺ-ŤėášĹ©ŤĀĖŚüé Ka-la-al tini i Mi-lu a kahenulan nu saamisan nu Li-ma tu 200 kung-li, na un kahenukan nu macakatal a tukuy nu Syaw-pey, pakala tu 5000 a mihcaan a likisi, nu kasumamadanay a tukuy nu Mey-cow. zayhan nazipaan nu Ka-la-al izaw ku kasumamadan a likisi, Cen-ce-ta atu kakalibet a pitizang atu putah sakahini makaawas tu nipisengki amala kitakit nu nisubelidan a zaysang. In-cya wangh-lu "In-cyaw a kamu, Qhapaq √Ďan", nu saahebalay nu matahebay ayaw nu midebungay nu Nan-mey-cow, samacakatay nu miculu'ay. Uyni a wang-lu tusa ku sacipa' katuuday timul amis muculil pasayzaan a zazan. uzuma, u singanganay sa zazan nu Ma-ciw-piciw. uzma a wangle aayaw makay macakatay a In-cya kanatalay a nipatizengan, micidekay u macakatay a Wa-li. uzumay a wangle i pidebungan a zizay nu Si-pang-ya henay micukaymas, mahiniay zazan a luma' nu hungti. ŚćįŚä†Ť∑ĮÁ∂≤(ŚćįŚä†Ť™ě:Qhapaq √Ďan), . namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan:

°kipa),*********:ari*ipa) ". ka-r~…ĺa-ar~…ĺ-su-p…ô-s…ôn- ¶…ôn ***-**** ka-r~…ĺa-ar~…ĺ tini i mi-r~…ĺu a kańß…ônur~…ĺan nu saamisan nu r~…ĺi-ma tu *** kuŇč-r~…ĺi, na un kańß…ônukan nu ma ¶akatar~…ĺ a tukuj nu sjaw-p…ô, pakar~…ĺa tu **** a mińß ¶aan a r~…ĺikisi, nu kasumamadanaj a tukuj nu m…ô- ¶ow. zajńßan nazipaan nu ka-r~…ĺa-ar~…ĺ izaw ku kasumamadan a r~…ĺikisi, ¶…ôn- ¶…ô-ta atu kakar~…ĺib…ôt a pitizaŇč atu putańß sakańßini makaawas tu nipis…ôŇčki amar~…ĺa kitakit nu nisub…ôr~…ĺidan a zajsaŇč. in- ¶ja waŇčńß-r~…ĺu "in- ¶jaw a kamu, *ńßapa* *an", nu saańß…ôbar~…ĺaj nu matańß…ôbaj ajaw nu mid…ôbuŇčaj nu nan-m…ô- ¶ow, sama ¶akataj nu mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °aj. ujni a waŇč-r~…ĺu tusa ku sa ¶ipa Ē~ ° katuudaj timur~…ĺ amis mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ pasajzaan a zazan. uzuma, u siŇčaŇčanaj sa zazan nu ma- ¶iw-pi ¶iw. uzma a waŇčr~…ĺ…ô aajaw makaj ma ¶akataj a in- ¶ja kanatar~…ĺaj a nipatiz…ôŇčan, mi ¶id…ôkaj u ma ¶akataj a wa-r~…ĺi. uzumaj a waŇčr~…ĺ…ô i pid…ôbuŇčan a zizaj nu si-paŇč-ja ńß…ônaj mi ¶ukajmas, mańßiniaj zazan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu ńßuŇčti. ****(***:*ńßapa* *an), . namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan:
S.FORM: == kakaliman: == Mi-lu a nikiluan nu nisubelidan a zaysang nu kitakit. Áßėť≠ĮšłĖÁēĆťĀļÁĒĘŚźćťĆĄ duduc lyen-he-kow-cyaw-ke-win sakaput 1972 a mihcaan a nipaketu "midiput tu lalangawan nu kitakit atu kapulungan a nisubelidan a zaysang nu kitakit" kitakit a nisubelidan zaysang u tuzu' hamin nu tademaw iza ku kahenulan a lalangawan atu siacaay nisubelidan a zaysang. Mi-lu i 1982 a mihca 2 a bulad 24 a demiad micumud tu kapulungan a nikatatelek, uyni a kanatal lalanay atu lalangawa a nazipaan namahiza kapah mala "nikiluan a ngangan nu nisubelidan a zaysang nu kitakit" Mi-lu katukuh 2021 a mihcaan pulung iza ku 13 a kitizaan nu nisubelidan a zaysang nu kitakit, zuma siwa ku lalangawan a nisubelidan a zaysang, tusa ku kitizaan nu lalaya a nisubelidan a zaysang, namahiza maedem ku lalangawan atu lalayan a nisubelidan a zaysang tatungusay tu tusaay a kitizaan a nisubelidan a zaysang. makay siyan 9000~1200 a mihcaanay a Ci-al-ke a lalangawan, katuku kacakatad nu In-cya hungti a ziday malingatu mikuwan, Ku-s-ke-ku-cen izaw tu ku matenesay tu alikisi, kanahatu i 1535 a mihcaan, Si-pang-ya nu mitahaway ci Pi-sa-low atu Ow-cow nu midebungay miala tu hamin nu kakitizaan nu Ku-s-ke. Ťá™Ť•ŅŚÖÉ900„ÄúŚÖ¨ŚÖÉ1200 . uyza u Ku-s-ke atu sumamaday a likisi atu kahenulan, yadah t uku nisupedan tu nu ayaway a Ke-lun-pu zidayan a nisubelidan a nazipaan, saaca iza henay ku nu Nan-mey-cow u siacaay a nipatiza nu pidebungan a ziday nu Si-pang-ya, i 1983 a mihcaan pasakamu ku Lyan-he-kow cyaw-ke-wen a sakaput mala nu kitakit a nisubelidan a zayzang tu. Ca-wen-te-ta-al "Si-pan-ya a kamu, Chav√≠n de Hu√°ntar" nu Ca-wen a lalangawan u kahenulan nu migingkiway tu nazipaan, tini i Mi-lu saamisanay a An-ka-sen-ta-ci,laled tu Li-ma pakala tu 250 kung-li,katalakaw 3,15o depah, 1985 a mihcaan mala Lyen-he-kow-cyaw-ke- wen sakaput i ngangan nu kitakit tu nisubelidan a zaysan, nisulitan a nganganu Sya-wen migingkiway tu nazipaan. "Ca-wen" nu tizaay akamu nu Yencumin, u imi "puna". " ". Wa-s-ka-lan aidangan nu kanatal Áď¶śĖĮŚć°Ťė≠ŚúčŚģ∂ŚÖ¨Śúí Wa-s-ka-lan aidangan nu kanatal "Si-pan-ya a kamu, Parque Nacional Huascar√°n" nu Mi-lu aidangan nu kanatal, tini i An-ti-s a buyu'an satipay a Pu-lan-ka a buyu'an, satalakaway a buyu' nu Mi-lu, katalakaw 6,768 miay nu Wa-s-ka-lanay saamisan nu talakaway a buyu' tinini. 1985 a mihcaan mala Lyen-he-kow-cyaw-ke-wen sakaput kitakit nisubelidan a zaysan Cang-cang kitizaan migingkiw tu nu sumamadaya tuud Cang-cang "Chan Chan"nu itiniay Mi-lu nu saamisan a sakuwan tu La-pow-ta-te nu tabakiay a kitizaan migingkiw tu nazipaan, i nuwalian 5 kung-li nu Te-lu-si-lye. Cang-cang sa u kahenulan a tukuy nu Ci-mu hungti a kanatal, i 850 a mihcaan katukuh 1470 a mihcaan haymaw satu pitizeng, 15 se-ci palawpesen tu nu In-cya hungti a kanatal. ciniza sa ayaway nu Ke-lun-pu a zidayan Nan-mey-cow nu satabakiay a tukay, hamin nu hekal pakala tu 20 pin-bang-kung-li, hamin nu tukuy taneng 30,000 ku micumuday nu tademaw. u tukuy cacay a bataan ku nisanga' tu silanga'tay nu kakitaan a luma', uyni a kakitaan a luma' u sapisalisin, pitademad a lisin, biw, pisupedan tu nanum atu puenengan. Cang-cang i 1986 a mihcaan Li-n-he-kow-cyaw-ke-win sakaput mala u nisubelidan a zaysang nu kitakit, patahal pangangan u Cang-cang a tukay u kitizaan nu migingkiwaw tu sumamaday a tuud. . Ma-nu-aidangan nu kanatal ť¶¨Śä™ŚúčŚģ∂ŚÖ¨Śúí Ma-nu-aidangan nu kanatal "Si-pang-ya a kamu, Parque nacional del Manu" nu Mi-luay aidangan nu kanatal, tini i 1973 a mihca 5 a bulad 29 a demiad, 222 a lamangan nu micucu'ay aadipen a pihibangan. :Parque nacional del Manu) . Li-ma a likisi Śą©ť¶¨ś≠∑ŚŹ≤šł≠ŚŅÉ Li-ma a likisi u malumanay a tukuy, malumanay a tukuy i saamisay nu tukuy micapi tu Li-ma-k a sauwac, maci a zazan makay satip amis pasa wali nuwalian palahad, nuayawan nu Mi-lu u sakahenulan a piliwkuan. i capi nu Li-ma a kitizaan, iza ku nazipaan nu Pa-ha-ka "Pachacamac" misengiay tu Cow-kow-Sin-cyang-s-luay a nazipaan nu Kaw-cang a kanatal. likisi nu Li-ma paazih tu La-tin-Mey-coway, sikahenulan cen-ce, kye-zay atu lalangawan u sakahenulanay sa nu Si-pan-ya nu midebungay a tukayay palahad tu likisi. tungus kitizaan micidek ku lalangawan, masuped tu ku tawyaay a ziday a nipatizeng, nalimaan, kasazuma, nizungaan, siacaay a likisi, namahiza u zayliw makay i nidemiad, ninel atu kaydih nu saykay amisumad. caay kuyni dada', Li-ma likisian maading tu nu Mi-lu kanatal a hulic tu saka 28296 banggu lalangawan nu kanatal a nisubelidan a zaysang, ayaway likisi na u Li-ma-se a cen-bu, Li-ma-ke a cen-bu, lalangawanay a pulung situngus mikuwan. tini i Mi-luay a Sen-ma-tun-ci, patizeng i 1983 a mihcaan, calap tu lala' 27 emang tu kung-cin. Labu nu aidangan pasucaledesay a A-tu-s-san a buyubuyu'an, u talakaw caay tu knalecad, mauzipay yadah ku kasaetiman a aadupen mulangaway. labu nu aidangan malakuit ku 30 a kitizaan ayaw nu Si-pang-ya a zidayan tu nu sumamaday a nazipaan. Na-s-ka-syen "Si-pang-ya a kamu, L√≠neas de Nazca/'n√¶zk…Ďňź/" Ci-cu-wa a kamu "Naska siq'ikuna" caay a sakaput tini i satimulan nu Mi-lu a Say-ciw-la-sa-muan, i Na-s-ka-cen atu Pa-al-pa-se a laedan nu tabakiay hekal a masabacuay, u heni i ayaw nu kung-yen 500 a mihcaan katukuh kung-yen 500 a mihcaan, nu macakatay a Na-s-ka i likelikenan misanga' tu masahemungan ancaay pataay a nikelitan, amibakah tu maliwanay i baetu nu cayay kalecad a kulitan nu lala' a pabaluhay misanga'. ÁīćśĖĮŚć°Á∑ö(Ť•ŅÁŹ≠ÁČôŤ™ě:L√≠neas de Nazca/'n√¶zk…Ďňź/ ÔľõŚ•áś•öÁď¶Ť™ě:Naska siq'ikuna) . A- lye-ci-pa-cen a likisian ťėŅťõ∑ŚüļŚłēŚüéś≠∑ŚŹ≤šł≠ŚŅÉ A-lye-ci-pa "Si-pang-ya a kamu, Arequipa,Si-pang-ya a ngiha, "(a…ĺe'kipa)"Ay-ma-la-a kamu atu Ke-ciw-ya a kamu, Ariqipa" timul nu Mi-lu nu tamakiay a tukay, uyni dada' angangan nu Li-ma, namahiza nu A-lye-ci-pa sakuwan a sakaput, nu Mi-lu a kitizaan nu pahulicay a huing, hina panganganen tu " Mi-luay nipaketunan nu hulic tu angangan nu tukuy". ťėŅťõ∑ŚüļŚłē(Ť•ŅÁŹ≠ÁČôŤ™ě:Arequipa,Ť•ŅÁŹ≠ÁČôŤ™ěÁôľťü≥:(a…ĺe'kipa),ŤČĺť¶¨śčČŤ™ěŚíĆŚÖčšłėšļěŤ™ě:Ariqipa) ". Ka-la-al-Su-pey-sen-cen Ść°śčČÁąĺ-ŤėášĹ©ŤĀĖŚüé Ka-la-al tini i Mi-lu a kahenulan nu saamisan nu Li-ma tu 200 kung-li, na un kahenukan nu macakatal a tukuy nu Syaw-pey, pakala tu 5000 a mihcaan a likisi, nu kasumamadanay a tukuy nu Mey-cow. zayhan nazipaan nu Ka-la-al izaw ku kasumamadan a likisi, Cen-ce-ta atu kakalibet a pitizang atu putah sakahini makaawas tu nipisengki amala kitakit nu nisubelidan a zaysang. In-cya wangh-lu "In-cyaw a kamu, Qhapaq √Ďan", nu saahebalay nu matahebay ayaw nu midebungay nu Nan-mey-cow, samacakatay nu miculu'ay. Uyni a wang-lu tusa ku sacipa' katuuday timul amis muculil pasayzaan a zazan. uzuma, u singanganay sa zazan nu Ma-ciw-piciw. uzma a wangle aayaw makay macakatay a In-cya kanatalay a nipatizengan, micidekay u macakatay a Wa-li. uzumay a wangle i pidebungan a zizay nu Si-pang-ya henay micukaymas, mahiniay zazan a luma' nu hungti. ŚćįŚä†Ť∑ĮÁ∂≤(ŚćįŚä†Ť™ě:Qhapaq √Ďan), . namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan:

¶iw-r~…ĺa-sa-muan, i na-s-ka- ¶…ôn atu pa-ar~…ĺ-pa-s…ô a r~…ĺa…ôdan nu tabakiaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a masaba ¶uaj, u ńß…ôni i ajaw nu kuŇč-j…ôn *** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß kuŇč-j…ôn *** a mińß ¶aan, nu ma ¶akataj a na-s-ka i r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan misaŇča Ē~ ° tu masańß…ômuŇčan an ¶aaj pataaj a nik…ôr~…ĺitan, amibakańß tu mar~…ĺiwanaj i ba…ôtu nu ¶ajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a kur~…ĺitan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° a pabar~…ĺuńßaj misaŇča Ē~ °. ****(****:r~…ĺ*n…ôas d…ô naz ¶a/ Ē~ °n*zk**/ *****:naska si* Ē~ °ikuna) . a- r~…ĺj…ô- ¶i-pa- ¶…ôn a r~…ĺikisian ********* a-r~…ĺj…ô- ¶i-pa "si-paŇč-ja a kamu, ar…ô*uipa,si-paŇč-ja a Ňčińßa, "(a…ĺ…ô Ē~ °kipa)"aj-ma-r~…ĺa-a kamu atu k…ô- ¶iw-ja a kamu, ari*ipa" timur~…ĺ nu mi-r~…ĺu nu tamakiaj a tukaj, ujni dada Ē~ ° aŇčaŇčan nu r~…ĺi-ma, namańßiza nu a-r~…ĺj…ô- ¶i-pa sakuwan a sakaput, nu mi-r~…ĺu a kitizaan nu pańßur~…ĺi ¶aj a ńßuiŇč, ńßina paŇčaŇčan…ôn tu " mi-r~…ĺuaj nipak…ôtunan nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ tu aŇčaŇčan nu tukuj". ****(****:ar…ô*uipa,******:(a…ĺ…ô Ē~ °kipa),*********:ari*ipa) ". ka-r~…ĺa-ar~…ĺ-su-p…ô-s…ôn- ¶…ôn ***-**** ka-r~…ĺa-ar~…ĺ tini i mi-r~…ĺu a kańß…ônur~…ĺan nu saamisan nu r~…ĺi-ma tu *** kuŇč-r~…ĺi, na un kańß…ônukan nu ma ¶akatar~…ĺ a tukuj nu sjaw-p…ô, pakar~…ĺa tu **** a mińß ¶aan a r~…ĺikisi, nu kasumamadanaj a tukuj nu m…ô- ¶ow. zajńßan nazipaan nu ka-r~…ĺa-ar~…ĺ izaw ku kasumamadan a r~…ĺikisi, ¶…ôn- ¶…ô-ta atu kakar~…ĺib…ôt a pitizaŇč atu putańß sakańßini makaawas tu nipis…ôŇčki amar~…ĺa kitakit nu nisub…ôr~…ĺidan a zajsaŇč. in- ¶ja waŇčńß-r~…ĺu "in- ¶jaw a kamu, *ńßapa* *an", nu saańß…ôbar~…ĺaj nu matańß…ôbaj ajaw nu mid…ôbuŇčaj nu nan-m…ô- ¶ow, sama ¶akataj nu mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °aj. ujni a waŇč-r~…ĺu tusa ku sa ¶ipa Ē~ ° katuudaj timur~…ĺ amis mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ pasajzaan a zazan. uzuma, u siŇčaŇčanaj sa zazan nu ma- ¶iw-pi ¶iw. uzma a waŇčr~…ĺ…ô aajaw makaj ma ¶akataj a in- ¶ja kanatar~…ĺaj a nipatiz…ôŇčan, mi ¶id…ôkaj u ma ¶akataj a wa-r~…ĺi. uzumaj a waŇčr~…ĺ…ô i pid…ôbuŇčan a zizaj nu si-paŇč-ja ńß…ônaj mi ¶ukajmas, mańßiniaj zazan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu ńßuŇčti. ****(***:*ńßapa* *an), . namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan:
